headline: SBA Communications Corp (NASDAQ:SBAC) Beats Q1 2026 AFFO Estimates and Raises Full-Year Guidance
summary: SBA Communications beat Q1 AFFO estimates at $3.03/share, raised 2026 outlook, and saw 32.6% international leasing growth despite a slight revenue miss.
